title: Data Export & GDPR
content:
CloudDesk supports full data portability and GDPR compliance.

**Exporting Your Data:**
1. Settings → Privacy → Export Data.
2. Choose scope: All data, Tickets only, Contacts only.
3. Click 'Request Export'. You'll receive an email with a download link within 2 hours.
4. Download the ZIP containing JSON exports of all records.

**GDPR Rights:**
- Right to Access: Use the export feature above.
- Right to Erasure: Settings → Privacy → Delete Account. All personal data deleted within 30 days.
- Right to Portability: Data exports in JSON format.
- Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) available for Enterprise customers.

**Data Retention:**
Closed tickets are retained for 2 years by default. Configure custom retention under Settings → Privacy → Data Retention.

**Contact:**
For GDPR requests: privacy@clouddesk.io
